subject: [PATCH 2/8] mm: percpu: charge obj_exts allocation with __GFP_ACCOUNT

2026-05-11.patch_summary: This patch modifies the per-cpu memory allocation system to charge the metadata and payload allocations separately, allowing for more accurate accounting of memory usage. The patch does this by passing the __GFP_ACCOUNT flag to the obj_exts allocation and removing its accounting in pcpu_memcg_pre_alloc_hook(). This is a preparatory step for upcoming per-memcg-per-node kmem accounting. The changes affect two files: mm/percpu-internal.h and mm/percpu.c, with 11 insertions and 20 deletions.
